title: archemora rigidior var. ambigua
side_effects: Archemora rigidior var. ambigua can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing gastrointestinal issues like diarrhea and stomach cramps due to its high concentration of toxic compounds. Prolonged exposure to its essential oils has been linked to allergic reactions, including skin irritation and respiratory problems. Improper dosages can also disrupt liver function, leading to conditions like hepatitis and jaundice. In severe cases, excessive consumption may result in neurological symptoms, such as seizures and tremors.
